text:
There once was a girl named Nancy. She owned a pet parakeet. She loved him dearly. She would talk to him every night.

One night, a storm hit. Dark clouds filled the sky. The thunder.

Her window rattled.

What went out?

Who?

What bird?

Oh.

The rain. The wind. It knocked her out.

She didn an evening gown. That always made her happy. And her parakeet.

Where was her parakeet?

That.

Oh.
